title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Salesforce India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Salesforce India
jsonLd.description:
Salesforce India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Vijayawada operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Salesforce India:
Salesforce India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India!
